scripts.check: npm run check:frontend && npm run check:js && npm run check:invokes && npm run check:updater && npm run check:workflows
scripts.check:rust: cd src-tauri && cargo fmt --all -- --check && cargo test --locked --all-features && cargo clippy --locked --all-targets --all-features -- -D warnings
scripts.check:release: npm run check && npm run check:rust && npm run check:security
scripts.build:tauri:local: cd src-tauri && cargo tauri build --ci --config tauri.local.conf.json
scripts.release:local: npm run check:release && npm run build:tauri:local
